name: Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, sift together the flour, salt, cinnamon, and baking soda.
Add the sugar and vegetable oil to the dry ingredients.
Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
Stir in the shredded carrots and eggs until evenly distributed.
Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
Bake for 35 minutes (3 layers).
Allow the cake to cool completely before frosting.
Frosting:
1 8 oz Cream Cheese
1 Stick Margarine
1 Box Powdered Sugar
1/2 cup Pecans, chopped
1 tsp Vanilla Extract
In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese and margarine until smooth.
Gradually add in the powdered sugar and pecans, mixing well.
Stir in the vanilla extract.
Spread the frosting evenly over the cooled cake.
Enjoy!
